description_long: This rifle features a distinctive angular and geometric design, with a predominantly blue and gray color scheme accented by gold highlights. The body is constructed with a series of stepped, block-like segments, giving it a stylized, almost pixelated appearance. The stock and barrel are both elongated, with the barrel extending in a straight line and capped with gold-colored tips. The central section includes a visible trigger area and a grip, while the upper portion appears to have a raised sight or rail system. The overall form is sleek and modern, suggesting a lightweight yet robust construction. The rifle's unique coloration and stylized form make it stand out as a visually striking weapon suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylized, angular rifle with blue, gray, and gold accents, featuring a blocky, geometric design and elongated barrel. The rifle has a modern, visually striking appearance with a stepped body and highlighted details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the stepped, blocky body and the full length of the gold-tipped barrel and stock.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rifle's symmetrical, angular design and the alignment of the barrel and stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and trigger area.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage, grip, and the geometric structure of the rifle.
